blocks.text: Match preview: India face Afghanistan in 3rd ODI (ODI) on Sat, 20 Jun, 2026, 1:30 pm at MA Chidambaram Stadium Chennai. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Traditional spin-friendly track; low-scoring Tests, balanced in limited overs.
Variable conditions · High 34°C / Low 26°C · Rain: 6.5 mm · Wind: up to 18 km/h. Rain likely — DLS may apply; favour bowlers who hit the deck and teams with depth.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
